// purpose: Typecheck the ops-console UMD/babel-standalone app (apps/ops-console/console/*.tsx). React loads as a <script> UMD global, not an import, so jsx is 'react' (classic createElement) and _console-globals.d.ts declares the ambient globals. Relaxed (noImplicitAny off) — the goal is catching real logic errors in 550KB of UI code, not a strict ESM rewrite. Wired via `bun run typecheck:console`.
